welcome.heading: Set up your finances
welcome.body: A few quick steps to get your books ready. You can change everything later.
welcome.featureReports: File VAT returns and read financial reports

openingBalance.heading: Opening balance
openingBalance.body: Tell gigBuddy how much was in your bank account when you start keeping books here.
openingBalance.choiceLater: Set it later from a bank statement
openingBalance.laterHelp: When you import a bank statement, gigBuddy will offer to set the opening balance from it.
openingBalance.negativeHint: Use a negative amount if the account was overdrawn.
openingBalance.alreadySet: An opening balance is already set for this band.

profile.heading: Financial profile
profile.body: Used on your invoices and tax filings. You can edit this later on your profile page.

integrations.heading: Connect Mollie and Shopify
integrations.body: Optional. Connect Mollie to let customers pay your invoices online, and Shopify to import merch orders into your books. You can add or change these later under Settings.

accounts.heading: Default accounts
accounts.body: New bookings post to these accounts by default. You can change them later under Settings.

done.heading: You're all set
done.body: Your finances are ready. Head to the financial dashboard to see where things stand.

errors.opening_balance_exists: An opening balance is already set.
errors.period_closed: That date falls in a closed accounting period.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
